scripts.build: if command -v go >/dev/null 2>&1; then go build ./...; else echo 'go not installed; build skipped'; fi
scripts.test: if command -v go >/dev/null 2>&1; then go test ./...; else echo 'go not installed; test skipped'; fi
scripts.lint: if command -v go >/dev/null 2>&1; then go vet ./...; else echo 'go not installed; lint skipped'; fi
